## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run build:storybook`

## Accessibility

- [ ] Keyboard behavior reviewed
- [ ] Focus visibility reviewed
- [ ] Screen-reader labels/descriptions reviewed

## Release

- [ ] Changeset added or not required
